problem_title: Travel Rule workflows depend on manual handoffs
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and errors when Travel Rule messages, exception handling, and case data remain spread across multiple disconnected systems. This fragmentation makes it difficult to trace originator and beneficiary information and weakens audit evidence for compliance review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates Travel Rule messages, originator and beneficiary data, exception handling and case evidence into one coordinated workflow for compliance teams managing VASP operations.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule messages to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule messages through status tracking, exception handling, case creation and evidence preservation for streamlined compliance team review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer that connects Travel Rule messages, customer data, routing status and cases into structured workflows for VASP compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes failed or high-risk Travel Rule messages into case workflows for manual review and escalation, supporting operational control and regulatory traceability.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, message histories and evidence packages for Travel Rule workflows, supporting review readiness and regulatory auditing requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers to connect messaging status, exceptions and relevant data within one compliance operating system.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects outputs from existing Travel Rule providers and structures them into workflows without replacing the underlying providers.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule events into controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY links Travel Rule data, routing, exceptions and cases into one compliance workflow for VASP teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
